title: SettlementReceipt (x402 STARK Receipt Format Extension, target shape)
description: Target shape for the SettlementReceipt Claim, mapping to the fiscal_authority (x402-foundation/x402 issue #2405) seven-field qualification surface and to the charge_evidence reference value the metadata block points at. The SettlementReceipt is a six-element Claim (subject, predicate, evidence, temporal_frame, revelation_mask, anchor). Canonical preimage discipline: JSON Canonicalization Scheme (JCS) per RFC 8785, hashed with SHA-256 (lowercase hex), per x402-foundation/x402 issue #2326 v3 canonicalisation discipline section. The receipt_hash = SHA-256(JCS(receipt_object)) is the audit-time re-verifiable digest a regulator pins for retention windows of 4-6 years (MiCA Art. 80, DORA Art. 14, AMLR Art. 56).

canon_version.description: Canonicalisation discipline revision per x402#2326 v3. Two accepted forms : (a) `x402-jcs-v1.0.0` (explicit prefix, recommended for new emitters), (b) `1.0` or `1.0.0` (compact form, backward-compatible with `stark-vauban-pay-v1` Axis 1 fixtures on PR #2413). Maps to fiscal_authority field 6 (audit/canonicalisation version).

subject.description: Subject of the Claim. For SettlementReceipt, the merchant who received the payment.

kind.description: Subject kind. MerchantPseudonym = Poseidon(merchant_secret, app_domain, recipient_salt). Maps to fiscal_authority field 1 (provider/resource identity).

predicate.description: Predicate of the Claim. For SettlementReceipt, the Settlement predicate carrying the verified charge.

amount.description: Amount in smallest indivisible unit of currency, u256 as decimal string (integer base units, no float). Maps to fiscal_authority field 2 (exact charge amount).

currency.description: Currency identifier URN (e.g. urn:eip3009:USDC:starknet-sepolia). Maps to fiscal_authority field 2 (asset + network).

nullifier.description: felt252 nullifier consumed from the originating PaymentIntent. Anti-double-spend primitive.

intent_ref.description: ClaimRef pointing to the originating PaymentIntent. Maps to fiscal_authority field 5 (receipt/charge_evidence reference, via parent intent linkage).

settlement_index.description: Monotonic index within the merchant settlement stream. Anti-replay + audit ordering primitive.

evidence.description: Cryptographic proof that the Predicate holds. For SettlementReceipt, evidence is a VerifiedAttestation referencing the proven PaymentIntent + verifier signature.

intent_proof_ref.description: ClaimRef pointing to the STARK proof of the originating PaymentIntent.

verifier_pubkey.description: felt252 verifier public key (the verifier that signed off on the intent proof).

signature.description: SNIP-12 signature over the canonical Predicate preimage. Variable length depending on scheme.

batch_proof_ref.description: Optional ClaimRef to an aggregation circuit proof if this receipt is part of a batched settlement.

temporal_frame.description: Temporal validity of the Claim. For SettlementReceipt, Instant marks the settlement moment (single point, not a window).

issued_at.description: Unix timestamp when the receipt was issued by the verifier.

revelation_mask.description: Per-field disclosure policy. Default mask: amount/currency/nullifier/merchant/intent_ref Open, payer_pseudonym Hidden (privacy preservation).

anchor.description: On-chain commitment for the Claim. For SettlementReceipt, StarknetSettlement records the on-chain settlement event.

chain_id.description: Starknet chain identifier as felt252 hex. Sepolia: 0x534e5f5345504f4c4941 (ASCII SN_SEPOLIA). Maps to fiscal_authority field 2 (network).

tx_hash.description: felt252 Starknet transaction hash of the settlement event.

event_index.description: Index of the PaymentReceiptEmitted event within the transaction.
